In the Media

Press, professional media & recognition

Selected coverage featuring Miss Han Bin Lee.

https://www.phin.org.uk/

Private Healthcare Information Network Profile

PHIN is a government-mandated, industry-certified, independent organisation which publishes information about the safety, quality and costs of private healthcare.
Researchgate.net

ResearchGate Profile

Networking profile for Han Bin Lee, which displays their published medical research and allows other doctors and scientists to connect
Benendenhospital.org.uk Featured

Webinar: Cataract surgery and special lenses

Learn more about cataract surgery and special lenses with Miss Han Bin Lee, Consultant Ophthalmologist. Please note that any discounts advertised in this video are exclusive to attendees and registrants of the live event.
Independent Featured

Artificial cornea makes 91-year-old an NHS first for sight-saving surgery

Groundbreaking artificial cornea transplant performed on the NHS, emphasising how this new synthetic implant could significantly reduce long national waiting lists for patients in need of human donor tissue.
Sky News Featured

England's first artificial cornea transplant hailed a success

success of England's first artificial cornea transplant, performed on a 91-year-old man at Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust, marking a medical milestone that restored his sight and offers a promising alternative to the long waiting lists for human donor corneas.
BBC News Featured

First commercial transplant using an artificial cornea

National coverage of a landmark procedure restoring sight where donor tissue was not an option.
Frimley Health NHS Featured

Frimley Health surgeon pioneers artificial cornea transplant

The trust reports on one of the first EndoArt® artificial cornea transplants performed in commercial practice.
Back to home
Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmologist specialising in cataract surgery and complex corneal conditions across the NHS and private practice.
